title: The Elder Wand Collectible Replica
description: An authentic, high-quality hand-painted replica of Albus Dumbledore's legendary wand. Cast in durable collector-grade resin with a solid core, it feels perfectly weighted in your hand.

reviews.name: Harry P.
reviews.comment: Unbelievable details. It feels like real ancient wood. Worth every cent!

reviews.name: Luna L.
reviews.comment: Beautiful box, very high quality. The wood texture is perfect.

title: Hogwarts Alumni Crest Heavyweight Hoodie
description: Show your school pride in style. This dark charcoal heavyweight cotton fleece hoodie features a premium embroidered gold Hogwarts school crest, dynamic gold aglets, and dual-lined warmth.

reviews.name: Hermione G.
reviews.comment: Exceptionally warm and the embroidery detail is flawless. Excellent craftsmanship.

title: Golden Snitch Crystal Display Sphere
description: Capture the magic of Quidditch. This premium K9 crystal display ball features an intricately detailed 3D laser-engraved Golden Snitch floating gracefully in the center. Rests on a beautiful wooden dark-gold LED base.

reviews.name: Ron W.
reviews.comment: Brilliant nightstand lamp. The snitch looks like it's actually flying inside the glass!

title: Official Central Perk Giant Ceramic Mug
description: The exact oversized mug from your favorite coffee house. Features the iconic green and orange Central Perk logo on a dual-sided print. Holds a whopping 24 ounces of your favorite brew.

reviews.name: Gunther
reviews.comment: Reminds me of home. Holds a huge amount of coffee!

reviews.name: Rachel G.
reviews.comment: So cute and cozy. Perfect for hugging with both hands on rainy days.

title: You Are My Lobster Premium Graphic Tee
description: Are you ready to find your lobster? This ultra-soft, ring-spun premium combed cotton graphic tee features an original hand-drawn retro lobster illustration. Designed for long-lasting comfort.

reviews.name: Phoebe B.
reviews.comment: It's a known fact that lobsters fall in love and mate for life! Love it!

title: Monica's Apartment Yellow Peephole Frame
description: Bring a piece of television history directly to your front door. An exact resin recreation of the yellow ornamental peephole frame hanging on Monica's purple door. Comes with high-strength non-damaging mounting tape.

reviews.name: Monica G.
reviews.comment: Looks exactly like the one on my door. Perfect symmetry!

reviews.name: Chandler B.
reviews.comment: Could this BE any more nostalgic?

title: BTS 'Proof' Anthology Album Set
description: The ultimate anthology album detailing BTS's historic 9-year journey. The premium box set includes 3 compact discs loaded with hits and unreleased demos, an elegant 132-page photo book, card sets, and a collector's poster.

reviews.name: ArmyGirl
reviews.comment: Absolutely masterpiece! The photo book is thick and the photocards are so beautiful. Borahae!

title: BLACKPINK Official BI-PING-BONG Lightstick v2
description: Light up your area! The official BLACKPINK Hammer Lightstick Version 2 features interactive Bluetooth concert syncing, a reactive audio squeeze trigger, customized silicone squeaky hammers, and a dark sleek storage dock.

reviews.name: BlinkStar
reviews.comment: It squeaks! So satisfying and syncs perfectly with the mobile app for music videos.

title: Stray Kids '5-STAR' Oversized Streetwear Hoodie
description: Adopt the signature Stray Kids aesthetic. This premium heavy-brushed back oversized cotton hoodie features a dual-sleeve reflective star print and an artistic metallic '5-STAR' screen printed chest graphic.

reviews.name: StayForever
reviews.comment: Super comfy and oversized! The sleeve prints glow slightly under blue light.

title: Crash Landing on You Metallic Art Poster
description: Capture the breathtaking campfire night scene in Switzerland. Printed on high-grade archival 300gsm metallic foil paper, this poster glistens under ambient light, bringing the emotional romance directly to your wall.

reviews.name: Se-ri Fan
reviews.comment: The metallic texture makes the fire embers look like they are sparkling. Beautiful!

title: Korean Heart Finger Embroidered Minimal Hoodie
description: A subtle, ultra-sleek nod to all your favorite K-dramas. Features a beautifully stitched neon-accented mini hand-heart emoji gesture on the left chest. Extremely soft premium cotton blend.

reviews.name: DramaQueen
reviews.comment: Perfect minimal hoodie! People who watch kdramas instantly recognize it. Got so many compliments.

title: Goblin: The Lonely God Destiny Brass Necklace
description: An exquisite replica of the brass destiny necklace gifted by Kim Shin. Made of hypoallergenic 18K white-gold plated brass, featuring a central faceted stellar crystal and an engraved message of eternal destiny.

reviews.name: Eun-tak
reviews.comment: So delicate and absolutely gorgeous. The crystal catches light beautifully.
